task_completion.description: Verify that 'UAS Team' was added to the system picklists for resource types.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a picklist management window, vocabulary settings, or a dropdown menu for Resource Types in CAMEO Data Manager that explicitly displays 'UAS Team' as an available option.

task_completion.description: Verify the resource name is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a resource entry form with a 'Name' or similar field containing exactly 'Eagle Eye SAR Unit'.

task_completion.description: Verify the custom resource type is selected for the new resource.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Resource Type dropdown or field in the entry form showing 'UAS Team' selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the address details are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for address fields populated with '4000 Gateway Blvd' (Street), 'Cincinnati' (City), 'OH' or 'Ohio' (State), and '45245' (Zip Code).

task_completion.description: Verify the phone number is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a phone number field populated with '513-555-0199'.

task_completion.description: Verify the comments are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a comments, notes, or description field containing the text 'Equipped with thermal imaging and spotlight.'

task_completion.description: Verify the new resource record has been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the resource record displayed in a saved state, such as appearing in a main list of resources, a view-only mode, or a confirmation message indicating the record was saved.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the CAMEO Data Manager graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the actual CAMEO Data Manager application window (menus, toolbars, specific forms) being used, rather than terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not just type the expected answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data must be entered into the specific form fields of the CAMEO application, not in Notepad, Word, or a generic text document.

integrity.description: Ensure the resource type was actually added as a picklist option.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'UAS Team' value should appear as a selectable option in a dropdown menu or within a picklist configuration window, proving it was added to the system picklists rather than just typed into a free-text field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: CAMEO Data Manager is a real EPA/NOAA application. 'UAS Team' is a custom resource type that must be added to the system picklists; it is not a standard type. The resource name 'Eagle Eye SAR Unit' and phone number '513-555-0199' are synthetic/fictional, while the zip code '45245' is a real Cincinnati zip code. The agent must interact with the CAMEO GUI to complete these steps.
